commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -c 'cat > /tmp/login.py <<PYEOF
import json, glob, os, collections
os.chdir("/home/ec2-user/platform/data/smoker-shard-a")
stats = collections.Counter()
for p in sorted(glob.glob("*/cases/*.json")):
    d = json.load(open(p))
    t = d["trace"]
    bl = (t.get("bridgeLog") or "")
    app = d["app"]
    if app != "ecommerce_admin":
        continue
    if "ui_login for shopping_admin succeeded" in bl:
        stats["admin_login_ok"] += 1
    elif "ui_login for shopping_admin failed" in bl:
        stats["admin_login_fail"] += 1
    else:
        stats["admin_login_absent"] += 1
for k, v in stats.items():
    print(f"{k}: {v}")
PYEOF
python3.11 /tmp/login.py'
